title: How do I delete one of my email accounts, which no longer is supported by my old broadband provider?
creator: johntc344
content: My old provider has stopped supporting my old email address and I have changed to a gmail address. How do I remove the IMAP and smtp settings etc for my old email address? Also remove all trace of that unwanted old address please?
